creator: TsurutaniNaoki@gmail.com
text:
print/acroread9 and its localized versions are vulnerable.
	ref: http://www.adobe.com/support/security/bulletins/apsb11-03.html

Fix: 

update to the new version(9.4.1 to 9.4.2).
	here are some checksums:
